creator: philippe.michel7@free.fr
text:
Created attachment 215289
portmaster log

Build of mesa-dri-19.0.8_2 fails (see attached log), apparently due to the presence of llvm-devel.

I didn't try to uninstall this package to check, but the:
llvm-config found: YES (/usr/local/bin/llvm-config-devel) 11.0.0
while building the port without specifically trying to use this version of the compiler doesn't look right.

This is a recent regression. Build of mesa-dri-19.0.8 about a month ago when I already had llvm-devel installed went fine.
